title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
